posts.text:
The NPCs in Sid Meier's Civilization hold you to a stronger standard of justifying your war than the real world

By now I'd get a full screen popup from Gandhi denouncing me and forming an alliance with Napoleon Bonaparte

I’m a good pioneer

(from www.youtube.com/watch?v=4N6B...)

3 videos in 3 days is unusual but it HAPPENS

SOMETIMES

Don't worry, I got your video-to-watch-while-eating-dinner content right here hot and ready

Just posted episode 3 of my Satisfactory let's play on my gaming channel

Perfect for a short stint of thinking about *anything else*!

www.youtube.com/watch?v=4N6B...

Snippet of a WIP I’ve been noodling on

I’ve been spending a lot of time figuring out what I want my style to look like moving forward, so I’ve been experimenting here and there.

When I don’t do art regularly I get so inconsistent 🥲 hoping to dig myself out of that again
He's really goin' through it. I think we can all relate at this point.

If you missed this earlier today, I put together a short video about whats happening in Cuba right now because of the ongoing US oil blockade (...among... decades of other things)

www.youtube.com/watch?v=r0Ry...
Can someone else watch this pot? It's taking forever to boil.

And I just never saw them*

This website is still missing an edit button

Sometimes I'll be responding to comments and I'll come by an angry commenter and when I go to block them I see that they've *been* leaving angry comments for weeks and just never saw them

My dude has been trying to irk me for weeks and all it did was make blocking them funnier

Spring is nearly here, Adventurers. Which means, it’s time to return to PAXEast! If you aren’t catching our live show, you can come check out all the cute cryptid goodies, & snap selfies with Mothgirl & Gary the Sasquatch at booth 12081 all weekend long~ 
#paxeast #cryptidmerch #thestorytellersquad

I wasn't planning on uploading a video this morning but I really wanted to put something out about this, so, here's why the lights are out in Cuba

www.youtube.com/watch?v=r0Ry...

Don't worry everyone, I've been assured by MargaretForFreedom88 that the war in Iran is actually a good thing, and also not really a war, and also almost over, and also will last as long as it needs to but also it's not a war

So glad we cleared that up

I will not apologize for preferring the humble chalkboard over a whiteboard or heavens forbid some kind of smart board

With dust in my lungs I shall die a happy man
(This election is gonna be wild)

a CONTENT CREATOR

in MY politics?

It’s more likely than you think

In case you missed it (or YouTube’s notifications failed yet again), here’s this weeks episode of Stuff Keeps Happening!

www.youtube.com/watch?v=O2kd...

Recently added these nicknames for my dog to the roation after getting back into One Piece (the live action is great and now im back into the anime again)

- Monkey D. Floofy
- Tony Tony Chomper
- Prince of Alabarksta

It's about to drop like 40 degrees F in a couple of hours 

y tho (aside from earth science)

March 17 2026 | The United States is doing everything it can to throw an island of 10,000,000+ people into chaos so that some politicians can see their dreams of come true before they finally rid us of their presence #news #politics #unitedstates #cuba #stuffkeepshappening

March 16 2026 | I am but a record spinning endlessly as a needle traces my looping fractures, doomed to haunt the cold metal diaphragm of a phonograph with the unheeded ramblings of a man long since lost. Or something like that idk. #news #politics #unitedstates #stuffkeepshappening #endeavorance
March 12 2026 | More like OpenA-BYE #news #ai #technology #stuffkeepshappening

A few more highlights from the second episode of my Satisfactory lets play! I've got about 150 hours in a save file on my PS5 but I'm making a new factory from scratch on PC for this series. It's going... well, it's going. #gaming #satisfactory #letsplay #endeavorance
Clips from the second installment of my new Satisfactory let's play series 🚧 #gaming #satisfactory #letsplay #endeavorance #funny

March 10 2026 | Trans residents in Kansas had their driver's licenses unilaterally revoked because weird losers in seats of power don't know how else to govern besides harming a perceived out-group #news #kansas #politics #transrights #stuffkeepshappening
March 9 2026 | Oh, cool, we're really doing it, like for real. Who could have seen THAT coming? #news #unitedstates #iran #politics #stuffkeepshappening
Highlights from a recent Satisfactory let’s play I recorded before I woke up to the news that we are super at war again #gaming #satisfactory #endeavorance #letsplay
March 3 2026 | Netflix and Paramounts heated rivalry #stuffkeepshappening #news #entertainment #streaming #tv
March 2 2026 | In which energy itself attempts to stop me from making this video for you. Which, I mean, fair. #news #technology #ai #unitedstates #stuffkeepshappening
